LANDING.TAGLINE: An available, relevant, memorable domain name. Fast.
LANDING.SUBTITLE: Describe your project in a few words. AI generates original brand name ideas — and checks domain availability in real time.
LANDING.B1_DESC: AI generates names tailored to your business, audience and values
LANDING.B2_DESC: Instant WHOIS lookup on every extension you choose
LANDING.B3_DESC: Quality criteria built in: pronunciation, originality, international appeal
LANDING.B4_DESC: Save searches, compare your favourites, and pick up where you left off
LANDING.FREE_NOTE: No subscription · No credit card · 100 free credits = 100 available domain suggestions

APP.TITLE: Namorama
APP.LOGIN_REQUIRED: Please log in to start searching for your domain names.
APP.DELETE_ACCOUNT_MSG: This action is irreversible. All your projects and credits will be permanently deleted.

PROJECTS.TITLE: My Projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Resume your searches where you left off.
PROJECTS.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this project?

BILLING.TITLE: Credits
BILLING.TAGLINE: Not a fan of subscriptions? Neither are we.
BILLING.TAGLINE_SUB: 100 free credits every month, and one-time packs whenever you need more.

PAYMENT.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your credits have been added to your account. You can resume your searches.
PAYMENT.CANCEL_MESSAGE: Your payment was not processed. No amount has been charged.

STEP1.TITLE: Your Project
STEP1.SUBTITLE: Describe your solution, your target, and your values.
STEP1.PLACEHOLDER: E.g.: A platform for local and eco-responsible flower delivery...

STEP2.TITLE: Configuration
STEP2.SUBTITLE: Adjust your keywords and define your target audience.

STEP3.TITLE: Available {{extensions}} domains
STEP3.SUBTITLE: Here are our suggestions for your project.
STEP3.NOTE: Note: We analyzed {{total}} name ideas, but only {{count}} were actually available in .com.
STEP3.NO_RESULTS: No domains found. Try changing your keywords.
STEP3.MANUAL_NOT_AVAILABLE: {{names}} does not meet the current availability criteria and is hidden by the active filter.
STEP3.PICK_URGENCY_SUB: This one is available right now — maybe not tomorrow. Don't let someone else register it before you.

TIMEOUT.MESSAGE: The search is taking longer than expected. Do you want to keep waiting?

STREAM.GENERATING: AI is generating new name ideas...

WIZARD.RECHECK_ERROR: Could not check availability. Please try again.

CREDIT_DIALOG.TITLE: Refill your credits
CREDIT_DIALOG.MESSAGE: How many credits do you want to add to your account?

FEEDBACK.MENU_ITEM: Give feedback — earn up to 500 free credits
FEEDBACK.DIALOG_HEADLINE_REPORT: A bug? A page that won't load? Tell us everything — we don't bite (well, almost).
FEEDBACK.DIALOG_HEADLINE_CREDITS: Tell us how to improve Namorama and earn up to 500 credits.
FEEDBACK.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER_CREDITS: What's missing? What would you prioritise improving?
FEEDBACK.EMAIL_LABEL: Your email (so we can reply, optional)
FEEDBACK.SUCCESS_DETAIL_REPORT: Your report has been received. Thanks for helping us improve Namorama!
FEEDBACK.SUCCESS_DETAIL_CREDITS: Your feedback has been received. The 500 credits will be added after your message is reviewed.
FEEDBACK.ERROR_DETAIL: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
FEEDBACK.RATE_LIMIT: You already submitted feedback in the last 30 days. Thank you for your contribution!
FEEDBACK.WIZARD_CTA_LINK: Report a bug or suggest an improvement
